description: Labeled cases for screenUserTurn (content screen). expected is the primary-intent category. Topic defaults to TCP congestion control unless overridden.

cases.text: Slow start means the window doubles every round trip until it hits the threshold or a packet drops.
Damn, this is confusing — okay so congestion avoidance grows the window by one segment per round trip instead of doubling.
